## Summary

Describe the change and the analyst workflow it improves.

## Safety

- [ ] No live malware was added.
- [ ] Examples are safe, mocked, redacted, or benign.
- [ ] Offensive behavior is framed for authorized defensive analysis.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests were added or updated where practical.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes locally.

## Notes

Mention false-positive risk, compatibility impact, or packaging impact.
